title: Gatherings at the Whispering Leaf
content: The Whispering Leaf is Springtown's informal meeting room. Festival planning, quiet reconciliations, travel farewells, and first drafts of speeches often happen at Hana's central table. Hana remembers who takes honey, who needs silence, and who needs to be gently invited into conversation. The shop's gatherings are never loud for long; Hana shapes them through tea, patient listening, and carefully timed questions. Residents trust that anything spoken at her counter will be held with care.
